"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); const matcher_1 = require("./matcher"); class PartialMatcher extends matcher_1.default { match(filepath) { const parts = filepath.split('/'); const levels = parts.length; const patterns = this._storage.filter((info) => !info.complete || info.segments.length > levels); for (const pattern of patterns) { const section = pattern.sections[0]; /** * In this case, the pattern has a globstar and we must read all directories unconditionally, * but only if the level has reached the end of the first group. * * fixtures/{a,b}/** * ^ true/false ^ always true */ if (!pattern.complete && levels > section.length) { return true; } const match = parts.every((part, index) => { const segment = pattern.segments[index]; if (segment.dynamic && segment.patternRe.test(part)) { return true; } if (!segment.dynamic && segment.pattern === part) { return true; } return false; }); if (match) { return true; } } return false; } } exports.default = PartialMatcher;
